Zapata Computing, Inc. announced that it has completed its business combination with Andretti Acquisition Corp., a special purpose acquisition company.

Zapata Computing, Inc. ("Zapata AI"), the Industrial Generative AI software company developing solutions to solve enterprises' most difficult, industrial-scale problems, announced that it has completed its business combination with Andretti Acquisition Corp. (NYSE: WNNR), a special purpose acquisition company.

Zapata Computing, Inc. ("Zapata AI"), the Industrial Generative AI software company developing solutions to solve enterprises' most difficult, industrial-scale problems, announced that it has completed its business combination with Andretti Acquisition Corp. (NYSE: WNNR), a special purpose acquisition company.

Zapata AI's enterprise and government customers have included Sumitomo Mitsui Trust Bank (SMTB), BBVA, BP, BASF, the Defense Advanced Research Projects Agency (DARPA), and Andretti Global, among numerous research and university partners.
